<!-- A short summary of the change and the motivation behind it. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 🎨 UI / accessibility

## How was it tested?

<!-- e.g. `npm run test` (all green), `npm run build`, manual check on /report -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run test` and `npm run build` pass locally
- [ ] New source files carry the `SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-or-later` header
- [ ] New logic is covered by a Vitest test where practical
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (user-visible changes only)
- [ ] No secrets or personal data in the diff
